testcase.name: testMyApi

failure.message: 1 expectation failed. Expected header "Content-Type" was not "application/json", was "application/json; charset=utf-8". Headers are: Date=Wed, 13 Nov 2024 12:45:00 GMT Content-Type=application/json; charset=utf-8 Content-Length=32 Connection=keep-alive Cache-Control=no-cache referrer-policy=strict-origin-when-cross-origin vary=Origin x-content-type-options=nosniff x-download-options=noopen x-frame-options=SAMEORIGIN x-permitted-cross-domain-policies=none x-request-id=6cad956d-201d-4512-930e-8e33d8f2040c x-runtime=0.026221 x-xss-protection=0 cf-cache-status=DYNAMIC Report-To={"endpoints":[{"url":"https:\/\/a.nel.cloudflare.com\/report\/v4?s=r1sWdzDNclZHO6ZWYJ1iemfI37a23tCJLn5I1BxGbBceUAif2sbminByanckuCv023DoSjVKirfE73AbhehcJna1r9RjTvLy0H%2Ba30k5z0h1x3W6joQAv1q8JCpULJs%3D"}],"group":"cf-nel","max_age":604800} NEL={"success_fraction":0,"report_to":"cf-nel","max_age":604800} Server=cloudflare CF-RAY=8e1edb3a6b9d2b78-LAX alt-svc=h3=":443"; ma=86400 server-timing=cfL4;desc="?proto=TCP&rtt=200285&sent=6&recv=6&lost=0&retrans=0&sent_bytes=2884&recv_bytes=881&delivery_rate=21015&cwnd=252&unsent_bytes=0&cid=36e1681bd5503ab8&ts=1173&x=0"

testcase.failure:
java.lang.AssertionError: 1 expectation failed. Expected header "Content-Type" was not "application/json", was "application/json; charset=utf-8". Headers are: Date=Wed, 13 Nov 2024 12:45:00 GMT Content-Type=application/json; charset=utf-8 Content-Length=32 Connection=keep-alive Cache-Control=no-cache referrer-policy=strict-origin-when-cross-origin vary=Origin x-content-type-options=nosniff x-download-options=noopen x-frame-options=SAMEORIGIN x-permitted-cross-domain-policies=none x-request-id=6cad956d-201d-4512-930e-8e33d8f2040c x-runtime=0.026221 x-xss-protection=0 cf-cache-status=DYNAMIC Report-To={"endpoints":[{"url":"https:\/\/a.nel.cloudflare.com\/report\/v4?s=r1sWdzDNclZHO6ZWYJ1iemfI37a23tCJLn5I1BxGbBceUAif2sbminByanckuCv023DoSjVKirfE73AbhehcJna1r9RjTvLy0H%2Ba30k5z0h1x3W6joQAv1q8JCpULJs%3D"}],"group":"cf-nel","max_age":604800} NEL={"success_fraction":0,"report_to":"cf-nel","max_age":604800} Server=cloudflare CF-RAY=8e1edb3a6b9d2b78-LAX alt-svc=h3=":443"; ma=86400 server-timing=cfL4;desc="?proto=TCP&rtt=200285&sent=6&recv=6&lost=0&retrans=0&sent_bytes=2884&recv_bytes=881&delivery_rate=21015&cwnd=252&unsent_bytes=0&cid=36e1681bd5503ab8&ts=1173&x=0"
